title: Chinese-Style Pork Chops
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Chinese-inspired dish featuring pork chops in a savory mustard sauce, served with a crispy wrap.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the pork chops and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
3. Transfer the pork chops to a plate and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
5. Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Add the mustardy sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
7. Return the pork chops to the skillet and coat with the mustard sauce.
8. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the pork chops are cooked through.
9. Serve the pork chops with a crispy Indian wrap on the side.
10. Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped scallions, if desired.
